class CapacityTracker:
    used_slots: int
    max_slots: int

    def __init__(self, slots: int):
        self.used_slots = 2
        self.max_slots = slots

    def __len__(self) -> int:
        return self.max_slots - self.used_slots

    tracker = CapacityTracker(7)
